# Govori

> Govori is a free, open-source (AGPL-3.0) web app for learning Interslavic
> (medžuslovjansky), a zonal constructed language intelligible to speakers
> of Slavic languages. Content is community-driven and CC BY-SA 4.0.

## What the app offers

- A frequency-ordered starter course built from the community dictionary
  (~19,800 items, translations in 26 languages).
- Four exercise types: multiple choice, tolerant typing (any script,
  accents optional), pair matching, and cloze over real sentences.
- Spaced repetition (SM-2) with local-first progress and optional
  cross-device sync via an account.
- Latin and Cyrillic display, derived from canonical etymological Latin.
- English and Interslavic interface languages.

## Content policy

Learning items carry per-item provenance (imported, human, or AI-drafted).
AI-drafted content is originality-screened and human-reviewed before
publication. Sources: the Interslavic community dictionary (MIT),
Tatoeba sentences (CC BY 2.0 FR, attributed per sentence).

## For developers

- App repository: https://github.com/nicolacarkaxhija/govori
- API: REST with OpenAPI at /openapi.json on any instance.
- The project can be self-hosted; see deploy/ in the repository.
